relatedPeople.name: Minghan Xiao
relatedPeople.notes: London hackathon organiser at Imperial College. From Tianjin, China. Very nice guy. Shared both his X and LinkedIn.
relatedPeople.evidenceSnippet: Talked about builder communities, operator dashboards, and how SocialOS could support organiser follow-up.

relatedPeople.name: James Wu
relatedPeople.notes: Vice President at NVIDIA. Met in San Francisco in summer 2025 at iHealth. Tianjin University alumnus who shared his entrepreneurship story and how he got into NVIDIA.
relatedPeople.evidenceSnippet: Met at iHealth in San Francisco during summer 2025.

relatedPeople.name: Candice Tang
relatedPeople.notes: Independent lawyer focused on cross-border and intellectual property work. Met through a Chamber of Commerce event in Chengdu. Later visited her office and she treated me to a meal. Trusted partner contact.
relatedPeople.evidenceSnippet: Met at a Chamber of Commerce event in Chengdu.

relatedPeople.name: Xiyue Zhang
relatedPeople.notes: Lecturer at the University of Bristol. Met in the EngiMath staff kitchen during a dynamics workshop. Shared her first-year experiences. I want to invite her for lunch or dinner. Office is in the Merchant Venturers Build…
relatedPeople.evidenceSnippet: Met at a dynamics workshop in the EngiMath staff kitchen.

latestMirror.summaryText: This week centered on energized (1), social (1), stretched (1). Strongest lift: After a day of strong product conversations, I felt energized and wanted to lock in the follow-up quickly. Watch-out: After a run of back-to-back conversations, I felt stretched and needed a recovery block before writing again. Next experiment: protect one follow-up block and one recovery block.
